afterSnapshot.name: WIND_GUST_ALERT_THRESHOLD_KNOTS
afterSnapshot.description: Default wind gust alert threshold in knots for GET /api/wind-alert. Gusts strictly greater than this flag an alert. Overridable per-request via the optional `threshold` query param.

context.userMessage: Approved — build it, then run the tests and checks to verify.

rationale: Make the gust alert threshold tunable instead of hardcoding 25 knots.
implementation: Stored as an app config the handler reads via config.get, matching the BEST_WINDOW_* config pattern.
